mapper.sql: goodsId, categoryId, name, price, style, color, size, total, monthlySales, imgUrl, status, freight, remark, carouselImgUrl, remarkImgUrl, deleteStatus, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into goods (goodsId, categoryId, name, price, style, color, size, total, monthlySales, imgUrl, status, freight, remark, carouselImgUrl, remarkImgUrl, deleteStatus, createdDate) values (#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{total,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{monthlySales,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{freight,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{carouselImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarkImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deleteStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into goods
goodsId,
categoryId,
name,
price,
style,
color,
size,
total,
monthlySales,
imgUrl,
status,
freight,
remark,
carouselImgUrl,
remarkImgUrl,
deleteStatus,
createdDate,
#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{total,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{monthlySales,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{freight,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{carouselImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remarkImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deleteStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update goods
categoryId = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER},
style = #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
color = #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
size = #{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total = #{total,jdbcType=INTEGER},
monthlySales = #{monthlySales,jdbcType=INTEGER},
imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
freight = #{freight,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
carouselImgUrl = #{carouselImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remarkImgUrl = #{remarkImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deleteStatus = #{deleteStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update goods set categoryId = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, style = #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, color = #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, size = #{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total = #{total,jdbcType=INTEGER}, monthlySales = #{monthlySales,jdbcType=INTEGER}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, freight = #{freight,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, carouselImgUrl = #{carouselImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarkImgUrl = #{remarkImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deleteStatus = #{deleteStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM goods WHERE status = 1 AND deleteStatus = 0

SELECT goodsId, categoryId, name, concat(price,'') as price,total, monthlySales, imgUrl,style, status, concat(freight,'') as freight, remark, carouselImgUrl, remarkImgUrl, deleteStatus, createdDate FROM goods WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} AND status = 1 AND deleteStatus = 0 GROUP BY goodsId
SELECT color FROM goods WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} AND deleteStatus = 0 GROUP BY color
SELECT size FROM goods WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} AND color =#{color} AND deleteStatus = 0
